sqlMap.select:
select * from dsv_revisor P where P.id_usuario = #id_usuario#
and exists( select 1 from DST_REVISOR_TIPO_PROCESO q where q.id_tipo_proceso = #id_tipo_proceso# and q.id_revisor = p.id_revisor) order by nombre asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from dst_revision_revisor where id_revisor = #id_revisor# and id_revision = #id_revision#
sqlMap.select: select r.* from dsv_revisor r, dst_revision_revisor rr where r.id_revisor=rr.id_revisor and rr.id_revision=#id_revision#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE dst_revisor SET id_tipo_revisor = #id_tipo_revisor# where id_usuario = #id_usuario# and id_persona = #id_persona#
